channel.title: VST — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on VST (Vistra Corp) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Seth Klarman: ADDED VST (+25%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) added VST in Q4 2025 · 11.4% of portfolio. Aggressive Vistra add — AI data center demand thesis.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED VST (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added VST in Q4 2025 · 12.8% of portfolio. Adding to Vistra — power demand from AI.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)

item.title: Seth Klarman: ADDED VST (+30%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) added VST in Q3 2025 · 9.6% of portfolio. AI data center thesis — big add.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED VST (+25%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added VST in Q3 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. Same data center thesis as Klarman.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)

item.title: Seth Klarman: ADDED VST (+22%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) added VST in Q2 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio. First of three consecutive quarters building Vistra.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED VST (+18%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added VST in Q2 2025 · 9.0% of portfolio. Same Vistra thesis as Klarman — 3 Q build.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)

item.title: Seth Klarman: NEW POSITION VST · Q1 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) new position VST in Q1 2025 · 5.9% of portfolio. Klarman's first Vistra position — start of the 3 Q build.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Howard Marks: NEW POSITION VST · Q1 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) new position VST in Q1 2025 · 7.8% of portfolio. Howard Marks's first Vistra position — same quarter as Klarman.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)

item.title: Seth Klarman: ADDED VST (+28%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) added VST in Q4 2024 · 5.0% of portfolio. Major Vistra add — start of the multi-quarter build.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED VST (+22%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added VST in Q4 2024 · 6.5% of portfolio. Same Vistra thesis as Klarman — start of build.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)

item.title: Seth Klarman: NEW POSITION VST · Q3 2024
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) new position VST in Q3 2024 · 4.0% of portfolio. First Vistra position — start of multi-Q build.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Howard Marks: NEW POSITION VST · Q3 2024
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) new position VST in Q3 2024 · 5.2% of portfolio. First Vistra — same quarter as Klarman.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)
